top_signals.title: Nvidia jumps into PCs with new Arm-based chip debuting in laptops from Microsoft, Dell, HP
top_signals.summary: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang unveiled a long-awaited Arm-based PC chip, breaking into PCs for the first time on new laptops by Dell, Microsoft, HP, ASUS and others.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Europe’s Junk Firms Look to Cut Loan Costs in Hot Market
top_signals.summary: Borrowers are rushing to Europe’s leveraged loan market at the start of the week to reprice debt, as they seek to capitalize on favorable credit conditions to cut their margins.

top_signals.title: Strategy bitcoin sale timing throws wrench into $20 million Polymarket pool
top_signals.summary: A Polymarket pool asking whether Strategy would sell any of its bitcoin before May 31 had drawn more than $20 million in trading volume.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: More pregnant women in Japan undergo prenatal checkups
top_signals.summary: Noninvasive prenatal testing has gained popularity as an alternative to conventional tests due to its lower stress levels for mothers.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Activist shareholder Elliot built A$1B stake in Northern Star
top_signals.summary: This would place Elliot amongst the top 5 shareholders, joining the likes of Van Eck Associates and BlackRock.
